channel.title: writing on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in writing on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: On writing blog posts
item.description: Was talking recently with a friend about how hard it is to write blog posts and give talks these days. The longer you’re in the tech industry the more your opinions end up being “well it depends” and “I’m not sure”. These don’t quite make for good blog posts, hah. Was talking recently with a friend about how hard it is to write blog posts and give talks these days.
